mnemonics.title: Data Type Categories
mnemonics.content: **S**ensor **M**easures **A**ctions **M**edia (SMAM) - Sensor data, Metadata, Actuator data, Multimedia data.

mnemonics.title: JSON vs. Protobuf Choice
mnemonics.content: **J**SON for **J**oining systems (flexibility) and **J**ust looking (readability). **P**rotobuf for **P**erformance and **P**arsing speed.
